occupation: Chief Executive Officer at Lumo Digital Outdoor
headline: Business Leader & Digital Outdoor specialist

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description: LUMO is New Zealand’s only nationwide premium pure-play digital media network and is committed to establishing higher standards in innovation, accountability, transparency and digital creativity across the outdoor media sector. Our single-minded purpose provides clarity underpinned by a passion to always strive to be better. We are independent, free to explore the world and seek out new ideas and technologies. We are positive disruptors, asking the questions, testing the boundaries with the single intent of helping advertisers access the many untapped advantages of digital outdoor advertising. Follow our story as the journey continues...

experiences.title: Chairman & Trustee
experiences.description: This Trust's purpose is to inspire men of all ages to make positive and rewarding lifestyle choices by providing education programmes, information and research that encourage and promote good health. As incoming Chair, I am excited by the challenge of helping lead the trust through the next chapter of its evolution and help more men get healthy and stay healthy.

experiences.title: General Manager NZ & Director
experiences.description: I ran a business that operated in the highly competitive and dynamic Outdoor media sector which was both challenging and exciting. My priorities were simple - attract and keep the best people, exceed customer expectations, grow the business through innovation, acquisition and quality work and keep our shareholders happy. I was surrounded by the best people in the business who loved what we did as much as I did.

experiences.company: Outdoor Media Association of New Zealand
experiences.title: Member of Executive
experiences.description: Chair of Outdoor Marketing Association from 2008, helped transition as interim Chair of newly formed Outdoor Media Association of NZ (OMANZ) which was incorpoarted in April 2009. Relinquished Chair from July 2009 and took up role of Secretary. Voted as replacement Chair for the depating Pauline Hanton in August 2010 and stepped down in March 2013 to help foster some fresh thinking and remained an active member until my resignation from APN Outdoor in May 2016.

experiences.title: Chairman - Northern Regional Committee
experiences.description: I enjoy working alongside like-minded marketing professionals who are dedicated to the task of assisting the NZ Marketing Association add more value to its members and sponsors. As Chairman, I was able to help lead a change in the purpose and focus of the NRC. Job done, I chose not to stand for Chair in the 2011 elections but rather stay involved as a committee member.

experiences.title: Owner
experiences.description: Left Deltarg to start a new business in health sector. Established Fitness Station, a high-end boutique fitness club, with objective of wanting to help people reach more of their potential through exercise. After finding suitable site in Mt Eden, Auckland, fit out was completed within 4 months and memberships grew steadily achieving 75% of membership cap in year 1. Day-to-day running responsibilities weren't challenging enough so sold business and re-entered the media industry in Feb 2008 by joining APN Outdoor NZ as GM.

experiences.title: General Manager NZ
experiences.description: The unaddressed catalogue market in the early nineties was heavily dominated by one national player with bit-part play from two other organisations. Deltarg was formed to fill a huge service gap and to deliver a more targeted distribution solution to minimise waste. I was one of the founders that started Deltarg in 1994. Salmat, Australia's most successful unaddressed mail companies saw potential in Deltarg and became majority shareholders within just 5 years of Deltarg's inception, appointing me as Managing Director to drive the fledgling national operator. It set new service benchmarks in a fairly unsophisticated industry delivering more accounatbility, reliability and client service standards. For example, Deltarg was the first unaddressed mail comapny to achieve ISO 9001/2000 certification in 2002. After 12 successful years at the helm, Deltarg needed fresh ideas and I needed new challenges.
